docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
PETITION FILED BY CLAIMANT TAWASHA, JAMIL

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY CLAIMANT TAWASHA, JAMIL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,185.11 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT JAMIL TAWASHA. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. (206)
